import importlib
from importlib.metadata import entry_points

_PLUGINS = None


def get_plugins():
    global _PLUGINS
    if _PLUGINS is None:
        eps = entry_points(group="myapp.plugins")
        _PLUGINS = {ep.name: ep.load() for ep in eps}
    return _PLUGINS


def get_plugin(name: str):
    return get_plugins()[name]


def list_plugin_names():
    return list(get_plugins().keys())
